allow: PowerShell($d = \(Get-Content data\\cars.json -Raw\) | ConvertFrom-Json; "Cars: $\($d.Count\)"; $d | Group-Object category | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "dev.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Get-Content dev.log -Tail 10)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "dev.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Get-Content dev.log -Tail 15 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'node' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item dev.log,dev.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "stopped")
